caption: A person wearing dark clothing and gloves sits atop a dark green all-terrain vehicle (ATV) parked inside a garage or shed. The vehicle features a black front brush guard, large knobby tires, and a single headlight. To the right, a portion of another ATV is visible, showing its rear tire and frame. The environment includes a light-colored concrete floor and a doorway in the background that lets in bright daylight. As the scene progresses, the person on the green ATV remains stationary, and the camera angle shifts slightly, creating a subtle handheld movement. There are no visible logos or on-screen text. The interaction between the subjects and the environment remains constant throughout the clip, with the person simply perched on the vehicle while the camera captures a brief, steady shot of the front of the ATV.
